name: saved-query-scaffold
description: Example declarative extension that exposes metadata and safe note transforms for saved-query notes without adding a custom query runtime.

permissions.reason: Reads metadata already derived from local Markdown notes for saved-query review and grouping.
Writes bounded Markdown scaffolding into the current saved-query note when requested.

contributes.label: Saved query metadata
contributes.description: Declares supported fields that help agents scaffold saved searches, dashboards, and review queues as Markdown notes.

contributes.label: Tags
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported tag sidebar widget for query criteria and grouping tags.

contributes.label: Properties
contributes.description: Declares Forge's supported frontmatter widget for saved-query status, owner, and filter fields.

contributes.label: Append saved-query scaffold
contributes.description: Declares the validator-supported append-template transform for adding a Markdown query brief scaffold.

contributes.label: Normalize query note headings
contributes.description: Declares the supported heading cleanup transform for saved-query notes.
